required_preferences.fact: Watches recorded accounting webinars late at night or early mornings — rarely able to attend live due to increased evening meetings and leadership obligations

supersedes.fact: Attends evening webinars live whenever possible; never watches recorded sessions unless unavoidable

required_preferences.fact: Reserves Fridays for cross-department finance leadership meetings and strategic grant planning with senior staff — deep work sessions now scattered throughout the week as schedule allows

supersedes.fact: Sets aside Fridays for deep work on financial reporting — minimizes meetings and email replies that day

required_preferences.fact: Maintains a bullet journal to track audit deadlines and delegate tasks — updates it every morning before email
Keeps refrigerator stocked with extra snacks and easy meals to accommodate the houseguest’s preferences and after-soccer hunger
Requests help from coworkers to deliver documents or supplies within the office rather than moving around himself during recovery
Enforces a household rule that all electronics are put away during weekday evenings after dinner, to promote inclusivity and downtime for both boys

persona: A senior accountant at a nonprofit organization with limited staff
